consumer_purpose: Enable automated propagation of locale stubs when new English keys are added to en.ts, eliminating manual stub creation across 17 locale files

tests.coverage_conclusion: All 17 locales have 971/971 keys present; translation coverage ranges 71.2% (pl) to 79.3% (zh)

verification.script_execution: bun run generate-locale-stubs — correctly reports 0 stubs needed (locales already in sync with en.ts)
verification.script_idempotency: Running multiple times produces identical results (no-op when no keys are missing)

summary: Created a TypeScript script (packages/app/scripts/generate-locale-stubs.ts) that reads en.ts to extract all 971 keys, then for each of 17 locale files finds keys missing from the locale dict and generates stub entries with a [LOCALE_CODE] marker (e.g. `[PL]`). The script is proactively useful: when new keys are added to en.ts, running `bun run generate-locale-stubs` from packages/app/ will propagate stubs to all locale files in one step. Added the script entry to package.json. All 62 i18n tests pass. Currently all locales have all 971 keys (coverage tests enforce this), so no stubs needed to be generated immediately. The script is the mechanism; future en.ts additions will trigger stub generation.
